children.text: the number and amount of food products regulated by the Food and Drug Administration imported into the United States, aggregated by country and type of food;

a listing of the number of Food and Drug Administration inspectors of imported food products referenced in paragraph (1) and the number of Food and Drug Administration inspections performed on such products; and

aggregated data on the findings of such inspections, including data related to violations of the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act [ et seq.], and enforcement actions used to follow-up on such findings and violations.21 U.S.C. 301
